name: Prowlarr
description: Unified indexer manager that syncs with Sonarr, Radarr, and other *arr apps.

steps.instruction: First login will ask you to set up authentication. Select 'Forms (Login Page)'. Enter a username and password. Click Save

Add indexers: click Indexers (left sidebar) → Add Indexer → search for your preferred indexers (e.g. 1337x, RARBG, Nyaa). Click the indexer → click 'Test' → click Save. Add at least 2-3 indexers for best results

Connect to Radarr: Settings → Apps → click + → select Radarr. Set: Prowlarr Server = http://prowlarr:9696, Radarr Server = http://radarr:7878, API Key = paste your RADARR API key (the key you copied when setting up Radarr earlier). Click Test (must show green checkmark) → Save

Connect to Sonarr: Settings → Apps → click + → select Sonarr. Set: Prowlarr Server = http://prowlarr:9696, Sonarr Server = http://sonarr:8989, API Key = paste your SONARR API key (the key you copied when setting up Sonarr earlier). Click Test (must show green checkmark) → Save
Go to Settings → General → find the API Key. Click copy
